title: Black Holes Explained
script_summary: A quick dive into the enigma of black holes and their astonishing effects on spacetime.

segments.voiceover: Nothing escapes a black hole — except the truth about how they work.
Black holes are regions where gravity is so strong, not even light can escape.
They form when massive stars collapse, creating an event horizon — the point of no return.
Inside, gravity distorts spacetime, creating bizarre effects. Imagine time slowing down.
So, while we can't escape a black hole, understanding them reveals the true wonders of the universe.
Curious for more cosmic mysteries? Hit that follow button!
